tEn: SVDQuant: Absorbing Outliers by Low-Rank Components for 4-Bit Diffusion Models
tZh: SVDQuant：通过低秩组件吸收异常值实现4比特扩散模型
sEn: SVDQuant absorbs outliers via a low-rank branch, enabling 4-bit quantization for diffusion models with significant speedup and memory reduction.
sZh: SVDQuant通过低秩分支吸收异常值，实现扩散模型的4比特量化，显著提升速度并降低内存。
absEn: Diffusion models can effectively generate high-quality images. However, as they scale, rising memory demands and higher latency pose substantial deployment challenges. In this work, we aim to accelerate diffusion models by quantizing their weights and activations to 4 bits. At such an aggressive level, both weights and activations are highly sensitive, where existing post-training quantization methods like smoothing become insufficient. To overcome this limitation, we propose SVDQuant, a new 4-bit quantization paradigm. Different from smoothing, which redistributes outliers between weights and activations, our approach absorbs these outliers using a low-rank branch. We first consolidate the outliers by shifting them from activations to weights. Then, we use a high-precision, low-rank branch to take in the weight outliers with Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), while a low-bit quantized branch handles the residuals. This process eases the quantization on both sides. However, naively running the low-rank branch independently incurs significant overhead due to extra data movement of activations, negating the quantization speedup. To address this, we co-design an inference engine Nunchaku that fuses the kernels of the low-rank branch into those of the low-bit branch to cut off redundant memory access. It can also seamlessly support off-the-shelf low-rank adapters (LoRAs) without re-quantization. Extensive experiments on SDXL, PixArt-$Σ$, and FLUX.1 validate the effectiveness of SVDQuant in preserving image quality. We reduce the memory usage for the 12B FLUX.1 models by 3.5$\times$, achieving 3.0$\times$ speedup over the 4-bit weight-only quantization (W4A16) baseline on the 16GB laptop 4090 GPU with INT4 precision. On the latest RTX 5090 desktop with Blackwell architecture, we achieve a 3.1$\times$ speedup compared to the W4A16 model using NVFP4 precision.
absZh: 扩散模型能有效生成高质量图像，但随着规模扩大，内存需求增加和延迟升高带来了部署挑战。本文旨在通过将权重和激活量化至4比特来加速扩散模型。在如此激进的量化级别下，权重和激活都高度敏感，现有的训练后量化方法（如平滑）已不足够。为克服这一限制，我们提出SVDQuant，一种新的4比特量化范式。与在权重和激活之间重新分配异常值的平滑方法不同，我们的方法使用低秩分支吸收这些异常值。我们首先将异常值从激活转移到权重中，然后使用高精度低秩分支通过奇异值分解（SVD）处理权重异常值，而低比特量化分支处理残差。这一过程减轻了双方的量化难度。然而，独立运行低秩分支会因额外的激活数据移动而产生显著开销，抵消量化加速。为解决此问题，我们协同设计了推理引擎Nunchaku，将低秩分支的内核融合到低比特分支的内核中，以消除冗余内存访问。该引擎还能无缝支持现成的低秩适配器（LoRA），无需重新量化。在SDXL、PixArt-Σ和FLUX.1上的大量实验验证了SVDQuant在保持图像质量方面的有效性。我们将12B FLUX.1模型的内存使用减少了3.5倍，在配备INT4精度的16GB笔记本4090 GPU上，相比4比特仅权重量化（W4A16）基线实现了3.0倍加速。在最新的Blackwell架构RTX 5090桌面GPU上，使用NVFP4精度，相比W4A16模型实现了3.1倍加速。

items.en: Diffusion models have been proven highly effective at generating high-quality images. However, as these models grow larger, they require significantly more memory and suffer from higher latency, posing substantial challenges for deployment. In this work, we aim to accelerate diffusion models by quantizing their weights and activations to 4 bits. At such an aggressive level, both weights and activations are highly sensitive, where conventional post-training quantization methods for large language models like smoothing become insufficient. To overcome this limitation, we propose SVDQuant, a new 4-bit quantization paradigm. Different from smoothing which redistributes outliers between weights and activations, our approach absorbs these outliers using a low-rank branch. We first consolidate the outliers by shifting them from activations to weights, then employ a high-precision low-rank branch to take in the weight outliers with Singular Value Decomposition (SVD). This process eases the quantization on both sides. However, naïvely running the low-rank branch independently incurs significant overhead due to extra data movement of activations, negating the quantization speedup. To address this, we co-design an inference engine Nunchaku that fuses the kernels of the low-rank branch into those of the low-bit branch to cut off redundant memory access. It can also seamlessly support off-the-shelf low-rank adapters (LoRAs) without the need for re-quantization. Extensive experiments on SDXL, PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma, and FLUX.1 validate the effectiveness of SVDQuant in preserving image quality. We reduce the memory usage for the 12B FLUX.1 models by 3.5×, achieving 3.0× speedup over the 4-bit weight-only quantized baseline on the 16GB laptop 4090 GPU, paving the way for more interactive applications on PCs. Our quantization library***Quantization library: github.com/mit-han-lab/deepcompressor and inference engine†††Inference Engine: github.com/mit-han-lab/nunchaku are open-sourced.
items.zh: 扩散模型已被证明在生成高质量图像方面非常有效。然而，随着这些模型变得更大，它们需要显著更多的内存并遭受更高的延迟，给部署带来了巨大挑战。在这项工作中，我们旨在通过将权重和激活量化到4位来加速扩散模型。在如此激进的量化级别下，权重和激活都非常敏感，像平滑这样用于大语言模型的传统后训练量化方法变得不足。为了克服这一限制，我们提出了SVDQuant，一种新的4位量化范式。与在权重和激活之间重新分配异常值的平滑不同，我们的方法使用低秩分支吸收这些异常值。我们首先通过将异常值从激活转移到权重来整合它们，然后使用高精度低秩分支通过奇异值分解（SVD）处理权重异常值。这个过程减轻了双方的量化难度。然而，独立运行低秩分支会因额外的激活数据移动而产生显著开销，抵消量化加速。为了解决这个问题，我们共同设计了一个推理引擎Nunchaku，它将低秩分支的内核融合到低位分支的内核中，以减少冗余内存访问。它还可以无缝支持现成的低秩适配器（LoRA），无需重新量化。在SDXL、PixArt-Σ和FLUX.1上的大量实验验证了SVDQuant在保持图像质量方面的有效性。我们将12B FLUX.1模型的内存使用减少了3.5倍，在16GB笔记本电脑4090 GPU上比4位仅权重量化基线实现了3.0倍加速，为PC上的交互式应用铺平了道路。我们的量化库和推理引擎已开源。

items.capEn: Figure 1: SVDQuant is a post-training quantization technique for 4-bit weights and activations that well maintains visual fidelity. On 12B FLUX.1-dev, it achieves 3.6× memory reduction compared to the BF16 model. By eliminating CPU offloading, it offers 8.7× speedup over the 16-bit model when on a 16GB laptop 4090 GPU, 3× faster than the NF4 W4A16 baseline. On PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma, it demonstrates significantly superior visual quality over other W4A4 or even W4A8 baselines. “E2E” means the end-to-end latency including the text encoder and VAE decoder.
items.capZh: 图1：SVDQuant是一种用于4位权重和激活的后训练量化技术，能很好地保持视觉保真度。在12B FLUX.1-dev上，与BF16模型相比，它实现了3.6倍的内存减少。通过消除CPU卸载，在16GB笔记本电脑4090 GPU上，它比16位模型提供8.7倍加速，比NF4 W4A16基线快3倍。在PixArt-Σ上，它展现出显著优于其他W4A4甚至W4A8基线的视觉质量。“E2E”表示包括文本编码器和VAE解码器的端到端延迟。

items.en: Diffusion models have shown remarkable capabilities in generating high-quality images (Ho et al., 2020), with recent advances further enhancing user control over the generation process. Trained on vast data, these models can create stunning images from simple text prompts, unlocking diverse image editing and synthesis applications (Meng et al., 2022b; Ruiz et al., 2023; Zhang et al., 2023).
items.zh: 扩散模型在生成高质量图像方面表现出了卓越的能力（Ho等人，2020），最近的进展进一步增强了用户对生成过程的控制。基于大量数据训练，这些模型可以从简单的文本提示创建令人惊叹的图像，解锁了多样的图像编辑和合成应用（Meng等人，2022b；Ruiz等人，2023；Zhang等人，2023）。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Computation vs. parameters for LLMs and diffusion models. LLMs’ computation is measured with 512 context and 256 output tokens, and diffusion models’ computation is for a single step. Dashed lines show trends.
items.capZh: 图2：LLM和扩散模型的计算量与参数量对比。LLM的计算量以512上下文和256输出token测量，扩散模型的计算量为单步计算。虚线显示趋势。

items.en: To pursue higher image quality and more precise text-to-image alignment, researchers are increasingly scaling up diffusion models. As shown in Figure 2, Stable Diffusion (SD) (Rombach et al., 2022) 1.4 only has 800M parameters, while SDXL (Podell et al., 2024) scales this up to 2.6B parameters. AuraFlow v0.1 (fal.ai, 2024) extends this further to 6B parameters, with the latest model, FLUX.1 (Black-Forest-Labs, 2024), pushing the boundary to 12B parameters. Compared to large language models (LLMs), diffusion models are significantly more computationally intensive. Their computational costs‡‡‡Computational cost is measured by number of Multiply-Accumulate operations (MACs). 1 MAC=2 FLOPs. increase more rapidly with model size, posing a prohibitive memory and latency barrier for real-world model deployment, particularly for interactive use cases that demand low latency.
items.zh: 为了追求更高的图像质量和更精确的文本到图像对齐，研究人员正在不断扩大扩散模型的规模。如图2所示，Stable Diffusion (SD) (Rombach等人，2022) 1.4仅有8亿参数，而SDXL (Podell等人，2024) 将其扩展到26亿参数。AuraFlow v0.1 (fal.ai, 2024) 进一步扩展到60亿参数，最新模型FLUX.1 (Black-Forest-Labs, 2024) 将边界推至120亿参数。与大语言模型（LLM）相比，扩散模型的计算密集度显著更高。它们的计算成本随模型大小增长更快，为实际模型部署带来了难以承受的内存和延迟障碍，特别是对于需要低延迟的交互式用例。

items.en: As Moore’s law slows down, hardware vendors are turning to low-precision inference to sustain performance improvements. For instance, NVIDIA’s Blackwell Tensor Cores introduce a new 4-bit floating point (FP4) precision, doubling the performance compared to FP8 (NVIDIA, 2024). Therefore, using 4-bit inference to accelerate diffusion models is appealing. In the realm of LLMs, researchers have leveraged quantization to compress model sizes and boost inference speed (Dettmers et al., 2022; Xiao et al., 2023). However, unlike LLMs–where latency is primarily constrained by loading model weights, especially with small batch sizes–diffusion models are heavily computationally bound, even with a single batch. As a result, weight-only quantization cannot accelerate diffusion models. To achieve speedup, both weights and activations must be quantized to the same bit width; otherwise, the lower-precision side will be upcast during computation, negating potential performance enhancements.
items.zh: 随着摩尔定律放缓，硬件供应商转向低精度推理以维持性能提升。例如，NVIDIA的Blackwell Tensor Core引入了新的4位浮点（FP4）精度，性能相比FP8翻倍（NVIDIA，2024）。因此，使用4位推理加速扩散模型很有吸引力。在LLM领域，研究人员利用量化来压缩模型大小并提升推理速度（Dettmers等人，2022；Xiao等人，2023）。然而，与LLM（其延迟主要受加载模型权重限制，尤其是在小批量时）不同，扩散模型即使单批次也严重受计算限制。因此，仅权重量化无法加速扩散模型。要实现加速，权重和激活必须量化到相同位宽；否则，低精度侧会在计算时被提升，抵消潜在的性能提升。

items.en: In this work, we focus on quantizing both the weights and activations of diffusion models to 4 bits. This challenging and aggressive scheme is often prone to severe quality degradation. Existing methods like smoothing (Xiao et al., 2023; Lin et al., 2024a), which attempt to transfer the outliers between the weights and activations, are less effective since both sides are highly vulnerable to outliers. To address this issue, we propose a new general-purpose quantization paradigm, SVDQuant. Our core idea is to introduce a low-cost branch to absorb outliers on both sides. To achieve this, as illustrated in Figure 3, we first aggregate the outliers by migrating them from activation 𝑿𝑿{\bm{X}} to weight 𝑾𝑾{\bm{W}} via smoothing. Then we apply Singular Value Decomposition (SVD) to the updated weight, 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}}, decomposing it into a low-rank branch 𝑳1​𝑳2subscript𝑳1subscript𝑳2{\bm{L}}_{1}{\bm{L}}_{2} and a residual 𝑾^−𝑳1​𝑳2^𝑾subscript𝑳1subscript𝑳2\hat{{\bm{W}}}-{\bm{L}}_{1}{\bm{L}}_{2}. The low-rank branch operates at 16 bits, allowing us to quantize only the residual to 4 bits, which has significantly reduced outliers and magnitude. However, naively running the low-rank branch separately incurs substantial memory access overhead, offsetting the speedup of 4-bit inference. To overcome this, we co-design a specialized inference engine Nunchaku, which fuses the low-rank branch computation into the 4-bit quantization and computation kernels. This design enables us to achieve measured inference speedup even with additional branches.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于将扩散模型的权重和激活都量化到4位。这种具有挑战性的激进方案通常容易导致严重的质量下降。现有的方法如平滑（Xiao等人，2023；Lin等人，2024a）试图在权重和激活之间转移异常值，但由于双方都对异常值高度敏感，效果不佳。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种新的通用量化范式SVDQuant。我们的核心思想是引入一个低成本分支来吸收双方的异常值。为此，如图3所示，我们首先通过平滑将异常值从激活X迁移到权重W，从而聚合异常值。然后我们对更新后的权重Ŵ应用奇异值分解（SVD），将其分解为低秩分支L1L2和残差Ŵ−L1L2。低秩分支以16位运行，使我们只需将残差量化到4位，而残差的异常值和幅度已显著减小。然而，单独运行低秩分支会带来大量内存访问开销，抵消4位推理的加速。为了克服这一点，我们共同设计了一个专门的推理引擎Nunchaku，它将低秩分支计算融合到4位量化和计算内核中。这种设计使我们即使在有额外分支的情况下也能实现实测推理加速。

items.en: SVDQuant can quantize various text-to-image diffusion architectures, including both UNet (Ho et al., 2020; Ronneberger et al., 2015) and DiT (Peebles & Xie, 2023) backbones, into 4 bits, while maintaining visual quality. It supports both INT4 and FP4 data types, and integrates seamlessly with pre-trained low-rank adapters (LoRA) (Hsu et al., 2022) without requiring re-quantization. To our knowledge, we are the first to successfully apply 4-bit post-training quantization to both the weights and activations of diffusion models, and achieve measured speedup on NVIDIA GPUs. On the latest 12B FLUX.1, we largely preserve the image quality and reduce the memory footprint of the original BF16 model by 3.5× and deliver a 3.0× speedup over the NF4 weight-only quantized baseline, measured on a 16GB laptop-level RTX4090 GPU. See Figure 1 for visual examples.
items.zh: SVDQuant可以将各种文本到图像扩散架构（包括UNet（Ho等人，2020；Ronneberger等人，2015）和DiT（Peebles & Xie，2023）骨干）量化到4位，同时保持视觉质量。它支持INT4和FP4数据类型，并可与预训练的低秩适配器（LoRA）（Hsu等人，2022）无缝集成，无需重新量化。据我们所知，我们是第一个成功将4位后训练量化应用于扩散模型的权重和激活，并在NVIDIA GPU上实现实测加速的。在最新的12B FLUX.1上，我们大幅保持了图像质量，将原始BF16模型的内存占用减少了3.5倍，并在16GB笔记本级RTX4090 GPU上比NF4仅权重量化基线实现了3.0倍加速。视觉示例如图1所示。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Overview of SVDQuant. (a) Originally, both the activation 𝑿𝑿{\bm{X}} and weight 𝑾𝑾{\bm{W}} contain outliers, making 4-bit quantization challenging. (b) We migrate the outliers from the activation to weight, resulting in the updated activation 𝑿^^𝑿\hat{{\bm{X}}} and weight 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}}. While 𝑿^^𝑿\hat{{\bm{X}}} becomes easier to quantize, 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}} now becomes more difficult. (c) SVDQuant further decomposes 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}} into a low-rank component 𝑳1​𝑳2subscript𝑳1subscript𝑳2{\bm{L}}_{1}{\bm{L}}_{2} and a residual 𝑾^−𝑳1​𝑳2^𝑾subscript𝑳1subscript𝑳2\hat{{\bm{W}}}-{\bm{L}}_{1}{\bm{L}}_{2} with SVD. Thus, the quantization difficulty is alleviated by the low-rank branch, which runs at 16-bit precision.
items.capZh: 图3：SVDQuant概述。(a) 最初，激活X和权重W都包含异常值，使得4位量化具有挑战性。(b) 我们将异常值从激活迁移到权重，得到更新后的激活X̂和权重Ŵ。虽然X̂变得更容易量化，但Ŵ现在变得更困难。(c) SVDQuant进一步通过SVD将Ŵ分解为低秩分量L1L2和残差Ŵ−L1L2。因此，量化难度通过以16位精度运行的低秩分支得到缓解。

items.en: Diffusion models. Diffusion models (Sohl-Dickstein et al., 2015; Ho et al., 2020) have emerged as a powerful class of generative models, known for their ability to generate high-quality samples by modeling the data distribution through an iterative denoising process. Recent advancements in text-to-image diffusion models (Balaji et al., 2022; Rombach et al., 2022; Podell et al., 2024) have already revolutionized content generation. Researchers further shifted from convolution-based UNet architectures (Ronneberger et al., 2015; Ho et al., 2020) to transformers (e.g., DiT (Peebles & Xie, 2023) and U-ViT (Bao et al., 2023)) and scaled up the model size (Esser et al., 2024). However, diffusion models suffer from extremely slow inference speed due to their long denoising sequences and intense computation. To address this, various approaches have been proposed, including few-step samplers (Zhang & Chen, 2022; Zhang et al., 2022; Lu et al., 2022) or distilling fewer-step models from pre-trained ones (Salimans & Ho, 2021; Meng et al., 2022a; Song et al., 2023; Luo et al., 2023; Sauer et al., 2023; Yin et al., 2024b; a; Kang et al., 2024). Another line of works choose to optimize or accelerate computation via efficient architecture design (Li et al., 2023b; 2020; Cai et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024a), quantization (Shang et al., 2023; Li et al., 2023a), sparse inference (Li et al., 2022; Ma et al., 2024b; a), and distributed inference (Li et al., 2024b; Wang et al., 2024c; Chen et al., 2024b). This work focuses on quantizing the diffusion models to 4 bits to reduce the computation complexity. Our method can also be applied to the few-step diffusion models to further reduce the latency (see Section 5.2).
items.zh: 扩散模型。扩散模型（Sohl-Dickstein等人，2015；Ho等人，2020）已成为一类强大的生成模型，以其通过迭代去噪过程建模数据分布来生成高质量样本的能力而闻名。文本到图像扩散模型的最新进展（Balaji等人，2022；Rombach等人，2022；Podell等人，2024）已经彻底改变了内容生成。研究人员进一步从基于卷积的UNet架构（Ronneberger等人，2015；Ho等人，2020）转向Transformer（例如DiT（Peebles & Xie，2023）和U-ViT（Bao等人，2023）），并扩大了模型规模（Esser等人，2024）。然而，扩散模型由于其长的去噪序列和密集的计算，推理速度极慢。为了解决这个问题，人们提出了各种方法，包括少步采样器（Zhang & Chen，2022；Zhang等人，2022；Lu等人，2022）或从预训练模型中蒸馏少步模型（Salimans & Ho，2021；Meng等人，2022a；Song等人，2023；Luo等人，2023；Sauer等人，2023；Yin等人，2024b；a；Kang等人，2024）。另一条工作线选择通过高效架构设计（Li等人，2023b；2020；Cai等人，2024；Liu等人，2024a）、量化（Shang等人，2023；Li等人，2023a）、稀疏推理（Li等人，2022；Ma等人，2024b；a）和分布式推理（Li等人，2024b；Wang等人，2024c；Chen等人，2024b）来优化或加速计算。本工作专注于将扩散模型量化到4位以减少计算复杂度。我们的方法也可以应用于少步扩散模型以进一步降低延迟（见第5.2节）。

items.en: Quantization. Quantization has been recognized as an effective approach for LLMs to reduce the model size and accelerate inference (Dettmers et al., 2022; Frantar et al., 2023; Xiao et al., 2023; Lin et al., 2024b; a; Kim et al., 2024; Zhao et al., 2024d). For diffusion models, Q-Diffusion (Li et al., 2023a) and PTQ4DM (Shang et al., 2023) first achieved 8-bit quantization. Subsequent works refined these techniques with approaches like sensitivity analysis (Yang et al., 2023) and timestep-aware quantization (He et al., 2023; Huang et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024b; Wang et al., 2024a). Some recent works extended the setting to text-to-image models (Tang et al., 2023; Zhao et al., 2024c), DiT backbones (Wu et al., 2024), quantization-aware training (He et al., 2024; Zheng et al., 2024; Wang et al., 2024b; Sui et al., 2024), video generation (Zhao et al., 2024b), and different data types (Liu & Zhang, 2024). Among these works, only MixDQ (Zhao et al., 2024c) and ViDiT-Q (Zhao et al., 2024b) implement low-bit inference engines and report measured 8-bit speedup on GPUs. In this work, we push the boundary further by quantizing diffusion models to 4 bits, supporting both the integer or floating-point data types, compatible with the UNet backbone (Ho et al., 2020) and recent DiT architecture (Peebles & Xie, 2023). Our co-designed inference engine, Nunchaku, further ensures on-hardware speedup. Additionally, when applying LoRA to the model, existing methods require fusing the LoRA branch to the main branch and re-quantizing the model to avoid tremendous memory-access overhead in the LoRA branch. Nunchaku cuts off this overhead via kernel fusion, allowing the low-rank branch to run efficiently as a separate branch, eliminating the need for re-quantization.
items.zh: 量化。量化已被认为是LLM减少模型大小和加速推理的有效方法（Dettmers等人，2022；Frantar等人，2023；Xiao等人，2023；Lin等人，2024b；a；Kim等人，2024；Zhao等人，2024d）。对于扩散模型，Q-Diffusion（Li等人，2023a）和PTQ4DM（Shang等人，2023）首先实现了8位量化。后续工作通过敏感性分析（Yang等人，2023）和时间步感知量化（He等人，2023；Huang等人，2024；Liu等人，2024b；Wang等人，2024a）等技术改进了这些方法。最近的一些工作将设置扩展到文本到图像模型（Tang等人，2023；Zhao等人，2024c）、DiT骨干（Wu等人，2024）、量化感知训练（He等人，2024；Zheng等人，2024；Wang等人，2024b；Sui等人，2024）、视频生成（Zhao等人，2024b）和不同数据类型（Liu & Zhang，2024）。在这些工作中，只有MixDQ（Zhao等人，2024c）和ViDiT-Q（Zhao等人，2024b）实现了低位推理引擎并报告了GPU上的8位加速。在这项工作中，我们进一步将边界推至将扩散模型量化到4位，支持整数或浮点数据类型，兼容UNet骨干（Ho等人，2020）和最近的DiT架构（Peebles & Xie，2023）。我们共同设计的推理引擎Nunchaku进一步确保了硬件上的加速。此外，当对模型应用LoRA时，现有方法需要将LoRA分支融合到主分支并重新量化模型，以避免LoRA分支中巨大的内存访问开销。Nunchaku通过内核融合消除了这一开销，允许低秩分支作为独立分支高效运行，无需重新量化。

items.en: Low-rank decomposition. Low-rank decomposition has gained significant attention in deep learning for enhancing computational and memory efficiency (Hu et al., 2022; Zhao et al., 2024a; Jaiswal et al., 2024). While directly applying this approach to model weights can reduce the compute and memory demands (Hsu et al., 2022; Yuan et al., 2023; Li et al., 2023c), it often leads to performance degradation. Instead, Yao et al. (2023) combined it with quantization for model compression, employing a low-rank branch to compensate for the quantization error. Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) (Hu et al., 2022) introduces another important line of research by using low-rank matrices to adjust a subset of pre-trained weights for efficient fine-tuning. This has sparked numerous advancements (Dettmers et al., 2023; Guo et al., 2024; Li et al., 2024c; He et al., 2024; Xu et al., 2024b), which combines quantized models with low-rank adapters to reduce memory usage during model fine-tuning. However, our work differs in two major aspects. Firstly, our goal is different, as we aim to accelerate model inference through quantization, while previous works focus on model compression or efficient fine-tuning. Thus, they primarily consider weight-only quantization, resulting in no speedup. Secondly, as shown in our experiments (Figure 6 and ablation study in Section 5.2), directly applying these methods not only degrades the image quality, but also introduces significant overhead. In contrast, our method yields much better performance due to our joint quantization of weights and activations and our inference engine Nunchaku minimizes the overhead by fusing the low-rank branch kernels into the low-bit computation ones.
items.zh: 低秩分解。低秩分解在深度学习中因提高计算和内存效率而受到广泛关注（Hu等人，2022；Zhao等人，2024a；Jaiswal等人，2024）。虽然直接将此方法应用于模型权重可以减少计算和内存需求（Hsu等人，2022；Yuan等人，2023；Li等人，2023c），但通常会导致性能下降。相反，Yao等人（2023）将其与量化结合用于模型压缩，使用低秩分支补偿量化误差。低秩适配（LoRA）（Hu等人，2022）引入了另一条重要的研究路线，通过使用低秩矩阵调整预训练权重的子集以实现高效微调。这引发了众多进展（Dettmers等人，2023；Guo等人，2024；Li等人，2024c；He等人，2024；Xu等人，2024b），这些工作将量化模型与低秩适配器结合以减少模型微调期间的内存使用。然而，我们的工作有两个主要不同点。首先，我们的目标不同，我们旨在通过量化加速模型推理，而之前的工作侧重于模型压缩或高效微调。因此，它们主要考虑仅权重量化，导致没有加速。其次，如我们的实验所示（图6和第5.2节的消融研究），直接应用这些方法不仅会降低图像质量，还会引入显著开销。相比之下，我们的方法由于联合量化权重和激活，以及我们的推理引擎Nunchaku通过将低秩分支内核融合到低位计算内核中最小化开销，从而获得了更好的性能。

items.en: In this work, we focus on W4A4 quantization for acceleration, where outliers in both weights and activations place substantial obstacles. Traditional methods to suppress these outliers include quantization-aware training (QAT) (He et al., 2024) and rotation (Ashkboos et al., 2024; Liu et al., 2024c; Lin et al., 2024b). QAT requires massive computing resources, especially for tuning models with more than 10B parameters (e.g., FLUX.1). Rotation is inapplicable due to the usage of adaptive normalization layers (Peebles & Xie, 2023) in diffusion models. The runtime-generated normalization weights preclude the offline integration of the rotation matrix with the weights of projection layers. Consequently, online rotation of both activations and weights incurs significant runtime overhead.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们专注于W4A4量化以实现加速，其中权重和激活中的异常值都构成了巨大障碍。抑制这些异常值的传统方法包括量化感知训练（QAT）（He等人，2024）和旋转（Ashkboos等人，2024；Liu等人，2024c；Lin等人，2024b）。QAT需要大量计算资源，特别是对于调优超过10B参数的模型（例如FLUX.1）。由于扩散模型中使用自适应归一化层（Peebles & Xie，2023），旋转不适用。运行时生成的归一化权重阻止了旋转矩阵与投影层权重的离线集成。因此，在线旋转激活和权重会带来显著的运行时开销。

items.en: In this section, we first formulate our problem and discuss where the quantization error comes from. Next, we present SVDQuant, a new W4A4 quantization paradigm for diffusion models. Our key idea is to introduce an additional low-rank branch that can absorb quantization difficulties in both weights and activations. Finally, we provide a co-designed inference engine Nunchaku with kernel fusion to minimize the overhead of the low-rank branches in the 4-bit model.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们首先阐述问题并讨论量化误差的来源。然后，我们提出SVDQuant，一种用于扩散模型的新W4A4量化范式。我们的关键思想是引入一个额外的低秩分支，可以吸收权重和激活中的量化困难。最后，我们提供了一个共同设计的推理引擎Nunchaku，通过内核融合最小化4位模型中低秩分支的开销。

items.en: Migrate outliers from activation to weight. Smoothing (Xiao et al., 2023; Lin et al., 2024a) is an effective approach for reducing outliers. We can smooth outliers in activations by scaling down the input 𝑿𝑿{\bm{X}} and adjusting the weight matrix 𝑾𝑾{\bm{W}} correspondingly using a per-channel smoothing factor 𝝀∈ℝm𝝀superscriptℝ𝑚{\bm{\lambda}}\in{\mathbb{R}}^{m}. As shown in Figure 4(a)(c), the smoothed input 𝑿^=𝑿⋅diag​(𝝀)−1^𝑿⋅𝑿diagsuperscript𝝀1\hat{{\bm{X}}}={\bm{X}}\cdot\text{diag}({\bm{\lambda}})^{-1} exhibits reduced magnitude and fewer outliers, resulting in lower input quantization error. However, in Figure 4(b)(d), the transformed weight 𝑾^=𝑾⋅diag​(𝝀)^𝑾⋅𝑾diag𝝀\hat{{\bm{W}}}={\bm{W}}\cdot\text{diag}({\bm{\lambda}}) has a significant increase in both magnitude and the presence of outliers, which in turn raises the weight quantization error. Consequently, the overall error reduction is limited.

items.en: See Appendix A.2 for the proof. From this proposition, we obtain the intuition that the quantization error ∥𝑹−Q​(𝑹)∥Fsubscriptdelimited-∥∥𝑹𝑄𝑹𝐹\left\lVert{\bm{R}}-Q({\bm{R}})\right\rVert_{F} is bounded by the magnitude of the residual ∥𝑹∥Fsubscriptdelimited-∥∥𝑹𝐹\left\lVert{\bm{R}}\right\rVert_{F}. Thus, our goal is to find the optimal 𝑳1​𝑳2subscript𝑳1subscript𝑳2{\bm{L}}_{1}{\bm{L}}_{2} that minimizes ∥𝑹∥F=∥𝑾^−𝑳1​𝑳2∥Fsubscriptdelimited-∥∥𝑹𝐹subscriptdelimited-∥∥^𝑾subscript𝑳1subscript𝑳2𝐹\left\lVert{\bm{R}}\right\rVert_{F}=\left\lVert\hat{{\bm{W}}}-{\bm{L}}_{1}{\bm{L}}_{2}\right\rVert_{F}, which can be solved by simple Singular Value Decomposition (SVD). Given the SVD of 𝑾^=𝑼​𝚺​𝑽^𝑾𝑼𝚺𝑽\hat{{\bm{W}}}={\bm{U}}{\bm{\Sigma}}{\bm{V}}, the optimal solution is 𝑳1=𝑼​𝚺:,:rsubscript𝑳1𝑼subscript𝚺::absent𝑟{\bm{L}}_{1}={\bm{U}}{\bm{\Sigma}}_{:,:r} and 𝑳2=𝑽:r,:subscript𝑳2subscript𝑽:absent𝑟:{\bm{L}}_{2}={\bm{V}}_{:r,:}. Figure 5 illustrates the singular value distribution of the original weight 𝑾𝑾{\bm{W}}, transformed weight 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}} and residual 𝑹𝑹{\bm{R}}. The singular values of the original weight 𝑾𝑾{\bm{W}} are highly imbalanced. After smoothing, the singular value distribution of 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}} becomes even sharper, with only the first several values being significantly larger. By removing these dominant values, Eckart–Young–Mirsky theorem§§§https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Low-rank_approximation suggests that the magnitude of the residual 𝑹𝑹{\bm{R}} is dramatically reduced, as ∥𝑹∥F=∑i=r+1min⁡(m,n)σi2subscriptdelimited-∥∥𝑹𝐹superscriptsubscript𝑖𝑟1𝑚𝑛superscriptsubscript𝜎𝑖2\left\lVert{\bm{R}}\right\rVert_{F}=\sqrt{\sum_{i=r+1}^{\min(m,n)}\sigma_{i}^{2}}, compared to the original magnitude ∥𝑾^∥F=∑i=1min⁡(m,n)σi2subscriptdelimited-∥∥^𝑾𝐹superscriptsubscript𝑖1𝑚𝑛superscriptsubscript𝜎𝑖2\left\lVert\hat{{\bm{W}}}\right\rVert_{F}=\sqrt{\sum_{i=1}^{\min(m,n)}\sigma_{i}^{2}}, where σisubscript𝜎𝑖\sigma_{i} is the i𝑖i-th singular value of 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}}. Furthermore, empirical observations reveal that 𝑹𝑹{\bm{R}} exhibits fewer outliers with a substantially compressed value range compared to 𝑾^^𝑾\hat{{\bm{W}}}, as shown in Figure 4(d)(e). In practice, we can further reduce quantization errors by iteratively updating the low-rank branch through decomposing 𝑾−Q​(𝑹)𝑾𝑄𝑹{\bm{W}}-Q({\bm{R}}) and adjusting 𝑹𝑹{\bm{R}} accordingly for several iterations, and then picking the result with the smallest error.
items.zh: 证明见附录A.2。从这个命题中，我们得到直觉：量化误差∥𝑹−Q(𝑹)∥F受残差幅度∥𝑹∥F的约束。因此，我们的目标是找到最小化∥𝑹∥F=∥𝑾^−𝑳1𝑳2∥F的最优𝑳1𝑳2，这可以通过简单的奇异值分解（SVD）求解。给定𝑾^=𝑼𝚺𝑽的SVD，最优解是𝑳1=𝑼𝚺:,:r和𝑳2=𝑽:r,:。图5展示了原始权重𝑾、变换后权重𝑾^和残差𝑹的奇异值分布。原始权重𝑾的奇异值高度不平衡。平滑后，𝑾^的奇异值分布变得更加尖锐，只有前几个值显著较大。通过移除这些主导值，Eckart–Young–Mirsky定理§§§https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Low-rank_approximation表明残差𝑹的幅度显著降低，因为∥𝑹∥F=∑i=r+1min(m,n)σi2，而原始幅度∥𝑾^∥F=∑i=1min(m,n)σi2，其中σi是𝑾^的第i个奇异值。此外，经验观察表明，与𝑾^相比，𝑹表现出更少的异常值，值范围大幅压缩，如图4(d)(e)所示。在实践中，我们可以通过迭代更新低秩分支来进一步减少量化误差：将𝑾−Q(𝑹)分解并相应调整𝑹，进行若干次迭代，然后选择误差最小的结果。

items.capEn: Figure 6: (a) Naïvely running low-rank branch with rank 32 will introduce 57% latency overhead due to extra read of 16-bit inputs in Down Projection and extra write of 16-bit outputs in Up Projection. Our Nunchaku engine optimizes this overhead with kernel fusion. (b) Down Projection and Quantize kernels use the same input, while Up Projection and 4-Bit Compute kernels share the same output. To reduce data movement overhead, we fuse the first two and the latter two kernels together.
items.capZh: 图6：(a) 朴素地运行秩为32的低秩分支将引入57%的延迟开销，原因是下投影中额外读取16位输入和上投影中额外写入16位输出。我们的Nunchaku引擎通过内核融合优化了这种开销。(b) 下投影和量化内核使用相同的输入，而上投影和4位计算内核共享相同的输出。为了减少数据移动开销，我们将前两个内核和后两个内核分别融合。

full.sec: 4.3 Nunchaku: Fusing Low-Rank and Low-Bit Branch Kernels
full.secZh: 4.3 Nunchaku：融合低秩与低比特分支内核

items.en: Although the low-rank branch introduces theoretically negligible computation, running it as a separate branch would incur significant latency overhead—approximately 50% of the 4-bit branch latency, as shown in Figure 6(a). This is because, for a small rank r𝑟r, even though the computational cost is greatly reduced, the data sizes of input and output activations remain unchanged, shifting the bottleneck from computation to memory access. The situation deteriorates, especially when the activation cannot fit into the GPU L2 cache. For example, the up projection in the low-rank branch for QKV projection is much slower since its output exceeds the available L2 cache and results in the extra load and store operations to DRAM. Fortunately, we observe that the down projection 𝑳1subscript𝑳1{\bm{L}}_{1} in the low-rank branch shares the same input as the quantization kernel in the low-bit branch, while the up projection 𝑳2subscript𝑳2{\bm{L}}_{2} shares the same output as the 4-bit computation kernel, as illustrated in Figure 6(b). By fusing the down projection with the quantization kernel and the up projection with the 4-bit computation kernel, the low-rank branch can share the activations with the low-bit branch, eliminating the extra memory access and also halving the number of kernel calls. As a result, the low-rank branch adds only 5∼similar-to\sim10% latency, making it nearly cost-free.
items.zh: 尽管低秩分支在理论上引入了可忽略的计算量，但将其作为单独分支运行会带来显著的延迟开销——约为4位分支延迟的50%，如图6(a)所示。这是因为对于小秩r，即使计算成本大大降低，输入和输出激活的数据大小保持不变，瓶颈从计算转移到内存访问。当激活无法放入GPU L2缓存时，情况尤其恶化。例如，QKV投影的低秩分支中的上投影要慢得多，因为其输出超过了可用的L2缓存，导致额外的DRAM加载和存储操作。幸运的是，我们观察到低秩分支中的下投影𝑳1与低位分支中的量化内核共享相同的输入，而上投影𝑳2与4位计算内核共享相同的输出，如图6(b)所示。通过将下投影与量化内核融合，以及将上投影与4位计算内核融合，低秩分支可以与低位分支共享激活，从而消除额外的内存访问，并将内核调用次数减半。结果，低秩分支仅增加5∼10%的延迟，使其几乎无成本。

items.en: Models. We benchmark our methods using the following text-to-image models, including both the UNet (Ronneberger et al., 2015; Ho et al., 2020) and DiT (Peebles & Xie, 2023) backbones:
items.zh: 模型。我们使用以下文本到图像模型来基准测试我们的方法，包括UNet（Ronneberger等人，2015；Ho等人，2020）和DiT（Peebles & Xie，2023）骨干网络：

items.en: FLUX.1 (Black-Forest-Labs, 2024) is the SoTA open-sourced DiT-based diffusion model. It consists of 19 joint attention blocks (Esser et al., 2024) and 38 parallel attention blocks (Dehghani et al., 2023), totaling 12B parameters. We evaluate on both the 50-step guidance-distilled (FLUX.1-dev) and 4-step timestep-distilled (FLUX.1-schnell) variants.
items.zh: FLUX.1（Black-Forest-Labs，2024）是当前最先进的开源DiT扩散模型。它由19个联合注意力块（Esser等人，2024）和38个并行注意力块（Dehghani等人，2023）组成，总计12B参数。我们在50步指导蒸馏（FLUX.1-dev）和4步时间步蒸馏（FLUX.1-schnell）变体上进行评估。

items.en: PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma (Chen et al., 2024a) is another DiT-based model. Instead of using joint attention, it stacks 28 attention blocks composed of self-attention, cross-attention, and feed-forward layers, amounting to 600M parameters. We evaluate it on the default 20-step setting.
items.zh: PixArt-Σ（Chen等人，2024a）是另一个基于DiT的模型。它不使用联合注意力，而是堆叠了28个注意力块，包括自注意力、交叉注意力和前馈层，总计600M参数。我们在默认的20步设置下进行评估。

items.en: Stable Diffusion XL (SDXL) is a widely-used UNet-based model with 2.6B parameters (Podell et al., 2024). It predicts noise with three resolution scales. The highest-resolution stage is processed entirely by ResBlocks (He et al., 2016), while the other two stages jointly use ResBlocks and attention layers. Like PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma, SDXL employs cross-attention layers for text conditioning. We evaluate it in the 30-step setting, along with its 4-step distilled variant, SDXL-Turbo (Sauer et al., 2023).
items.zh: Stable Diffusion XL（SDXL）是一个广泛使用的基于UNet的模型，具有2.6B参数（Podell等人，2024）。它用三个分辨率尺度预测噪声。最高分辨率阶段完全由ResBlocks（He等人，2016）处理，而其他两个阶段联合使用ResBlocks和注意力层。与PixArt-Σ类似，SDXL使用交叉注意力层进行文本条件控制。我们在30步设置下进行评估，同时评估其4步蒸馏变体SDXL-Turbo（Sauer等人，2023）。

items.en: Datasets. Following previous works (Li et al., 2023a; Zhao et al., 2024c; b), we randomly sample the prompts in COCO Captions 2024 (Chen et al., 2015) for calibration. To assess the generalization capability of our method, we adopt two distinct prompt sets with varying styles for benchmarking:
items.zh: 数据集。遵循先前的工作（Li等人，2023a；Zhao等人，2024c；b），我们随机采样COCO Captions 2024（Chen等人，2015）中的提示进行校准。为了评估我们方法的泛化能力，我们采用两个具有不同风格的提示集进行基准测试：

items.en: MJHQ-30K (Li et al., 2024a) consists of 30K samples from Midjourney with 10 common categories, 3K samples each. We uniformly select 5K prompts from this dataset to evaluate model performance on artistic image generation.
items.zh: MJHQ-30K（Li等人，2024a）包含来自Midjourney的30K个样本，涵盖10个常见类别，每个类别3K个样本。我们均匀选择5K个提示来评估模型在艺术图像生成上的性能。

items.en: Densely Captioned Images (DCI) (Urbanek et al., 2024) is a dataset containing ∼similar-to\sim8K images with detailed human-annotated captions, averaging over 1,000 words. For our experiments, we use the summarized version (sDCI), where captions are condensed to 77 tokens using large language models (LLMs) to accommodate diffusion models. Similarly, we randomly sample 5K prompts for efficient evaluation of realistic image generation.
items.zh: 密集标注图像（DCI）（Urbanek等人，2024）是一个包含约8K张图像的数据集，带有详细的人工标注描述，平均超过1000个词。在我们的实验中，我们使用摘要版本（sDCI），其中描述使用大语言模型（LLM）压缩为77个标记，以适应扩散模型。类似地，我们随机采样5K个提示以高效评估真实图像生成。

items.en: Baselines. We compare SVDQuant against the following post-training quantization (PTQ) methods:
items.zh: 基线方法。我们将SVDQuant与以下后训练量化（PTQ）方法进行比较：

items.en: 4-bit NormalFloat (NF4) is a data type for weight-only quantization (Dettmers et al., 2023). It assumes that weights follow a normal distribution and is the information-theoretically optimal 4-bit representation. We use the community-quantized NF4 FLUX.1 models (Lllyasviel, 2024) as the baselines.
items.zh: 4位NormalFloat（NF4）是一种仅权重量化的数据类型（Dettmers等人，2023）。它假设权重服从正态分布，是信息论上最优的4位表示。我们使用社区量化的NF4 FLUX.1模型（Lllyasviel，2024）作为基线。

items.en: ViDiT-Q (Zhao et al., 2024b) uses per-token quantization and smoothing (Xiao et al., 2023) to alleviate the outliers across different batches and tokens and achieves lossless 8-bit quantization on PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma.
items.zh: ViDiT-Q（Zhao等人，2024b）使用逐token量化和平滑（Xiao等人，2023）来缓解不同批次和token中的异常值，并在PixArt-Σ上实现了无损8位量化。

items.en: MixDQ (Zhao et al., 2024c) identifies the outliers in the begin-of-sentence token of text embedding and protects them with 16-bit pre-computation. This method enables up to W4A8 quantization with negligible performance degradation on SDXL-Turbo.
items.zh: MixDQ（Zhao等人，2024c）识别文本嵌入中句子起始token的异常值，并用16位预计算保护它们。该方法在SDXL-Turbo上实现了W4A8量化，性能下降可忽略不计。

items.en: TensorRT contains an industry-level PTQ toolkit to quantize the diffusion models to 8 bits. It uses smoothing and only calibrates activations over a selected timestep range with a percentile scheme.
items.zh: TensorRT包含一个工业级PTQ工具包，可将扩散模型量化为8位。它使用平滑，并仅通过百分位方案在选定的时间步范围内校准激活值。

items.en: Metrics. Following previous work (Li et al., 2022; 2024b), we mainly benchmark image quality and similarity to the results produced by the original 16-bit models. For the image quality assessment, we use Fréchet Inception Distance (FID, lower is better) to measure the distribution distance between the generated images and the ground-truth images (Heusel et al., 2017). Besides, we employ Image Reward (higher is better) to approximate the human rating of the generated images (Xu et al., 2024a). We use LPIPS (lower is better) to measure the perceptual similarity (Zhang et al., 2018) and Peak Signal Noise Ratio (PSNR, higher is better) to measure the numerical similarity of the images from the 16-bit models. Please refer to our Appendix B.1 for more metrics (CLIP IQA (Wang et al., 2023), CLIP Score (Hessel et al., 2021) and SSIM¶¶¶https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Structural_similarity_index_measure).
items.zh: 评估指标。遵循先前工作（Li等人，2022；2024b），我们主要评估图像质量以及与原始16位模型结果的相似性。对于图像质量评估，我们使用Fréchet Inception Distance（FID，越低越好）来衡量生成图像与真实图像之间的分布距离（Heusel等人，2017）。此外，我们使用Image Reward（越高越好）来近似人类对生成图像的评分（Xu等人，2024a）。我们使用LPIPS（越低越好）来衡量感知相似性（Zhang等人，2018），并使用峰值信噪比（PSNR，越高越好）来衡量与16位模型图像的数值相似性。更多指标（CLIP IQA（Wang等人，2023）、CLIP Score（Hessel等人，2021）和SSIM¶¶¶https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Structural_similarity_index_measure）请参见附录B.1。

items.en: Implementation details. For the 8-bit setting, we use per-token dynamic activation quantization and per-channel weight quantization with a low-rank branch of rank 16. For the 4-bit setting, we adopt per-group symmetric quantization for both activations and weights, along with a low-rank branch of rank 32. INT4 quantization uses a group size of 64 with 16-bit scales. FP4 quantization uses a group size of 32 with FP8 scales (Rouhani et al., 2023). For FLUX.1 models, the inputs of linear layers in adaptive normalization are kept in 16 bits (i.e., W4A16). For other models, key and value projections in the cross-attention are retained at 16 bits since their latency only covers less than 5% of total runtime.
items.zh: 实现细节。对于8位设置，我们使用逐token动态激活量化和逐通道权重量化，并采用秩为16的低秩分支。对于4位设置，我们对激活和权重均采用逐组对称量化，并采用秩为32的低秩分支。INT4量化使用组大小为64和16位缩放因子。FP4量化使用组大小为32和FP8缩放因子（Rouhani等人，2023）。对于FLUX.1模型，自适应归一化中线性层的输入保持16位（即W4A16）。对于其他模型，交叉注意力中的键和值投影保留16位，因为它们的延迟仅占总运行时间的不到5%。

items.en: Quality results. We report the quantitative quality results in Table 1 across various models and precision levels, and show some corresponding 4-bit qualitative comparisons in Figure 7. Among all models, our 8-bit results can perfectly mirror the 16-bit results, achieving PSNR higher than 21, beating all other 8-bit baselines. On FLUX.1-dev, our INT8 PSNR even reaches 27 on MJHQ.
items.zh: 质量结果。我们在表1中报告了各种模型和精度下的定量质量结果，并在图7中展示了一些相应的4位定性比较。在所有模型中，我们的8位结果完美镜像了16位结果，PSNR高于21，优于所有其他8位基线。在FLUX.1-dev上，我们的INT8 PSNR在MJHQ上甚至达到了27。

items.en: For 4-bit quantization, on FLUX.1, our SVDQuant surpasses the NF4 W4A16 baseline regarding Image Reward. On the schnell variant, our Image Reward even exceeds that of the original BF16 model, suggesting stronger human preference. On PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma, while our INT4 Image Reward shows slight degradation, our FP4 model achieves an even higher score than the FP16 model. This is likely due to PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma’s small model size (600M parameters), which is already highly compact and benefits from a smaller group size. Remarkably, both our INT4 and FP4 results consistently outperform ViDiT-Q’s∥∥∥Our FP16 PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma model is slightly different from ViDiT’s, though both offer the same quality. For fair comparisons, ViDiT-Q’s similarity results are calculated using their FP16 results. W4A8 results by a large margin across all metrics. For UNet-based models, on SDXL-Turbo, our 4-bit models significantly outperform MixDQ’s W4A8 results, and our FID scores are on par with the FP16 models, indicating no loss in performance. On SDXL, both our INT4 and FP4 results achieve comparable quality to TensorRT’s W8A8 performance, which represents the 8-bit SoTA. As shown in Figure 15 in the Appendix, our visual quality only shows minor degradation.
items.zh: 对于4位量化，在FLUX.1上，我们的SVDQuant在Image Reward方面超过了NF4 W4A16基线。在schnell变体上，我们的Image Reward甚至超过了原始BF16模型，表明更符合人类偏好。在PixArt-Σ上，虽然我们的INT4 Image Reward略有下降，但我们的FP4模型得分甚至高于FP16模型。这可能是由于PixArt-Σ的模型尺寸较小（600M参数），已经非常紧凑，并且受益于更小的组大小。值得注意的是，我们的INT4和FP4结果在所有指标上均大幅优于ViDiT-Q的∥∥∥我们的FP16 PixArt-Σ模型与ViDiT的略有不同，尽管两者质量相同。为了公平比较，ViDiT-Q的相似性结果是使用其FP16结果计算的。W4A8结果。对于基于UNet的模型，在SDXL-Turbo上，我们的4位模型显著优于MixDQ的W4A8结果，并且我们的FID分数与FP16模型相当，表明性能没有损失。在SDXL上，我们的INT4和FP4结果均达到了与TensorRT的W8A8性能相当的质量，后者代表了8位SoTA。如附录图15所示，我们的视觉质量仅有轻微下降。

items.capEn: Figure 7: Qualitative visual results on MJHQ. Image Reward is calculated over the entire dataset. On FLUX.1 models, our 4-bit models outperform the NF4 W4A16 baselines, demonstrating superior text alignment and closer similarity to the 16-bit models. For instance, NF4 misinterprets “dinosaur style,” generating a real dinosaur. On PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma and SDXL-Turbo, our 4-bit results demonstrate noticeably better visual quality than ViDiT-Q’s and MixDQ’s W4A8 results.
items.capZh: 图7：MJHQ上的定性视觉结果。Image Reward在整个数据集上计算。在FLUX.1模型上，我们的4位模型优于NF4 W4A16基线，展示了更好的文本对齐和与16位模型更接近的相似性。例如，NF4误解了“恐龙风格”，生成了真实的恐龙。在PixArt-Σ和SDXL-Turbo上，我们的4位结果在视觉质量上明显优于ViDiT-Q和MixDQ的W4A8结果。

items.capEn: Figure 8: SVDQuant reduces the model size of the 12B FLUX.1 by 3.6×. Additionally, our engine, Nunchaku, further cuts memory usage of the 16-bit model by 3.5× and delivers 3.0× speedups over the NF4 W4A16 baseline on both the desktop and laptop NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPUs. Remarkably, on laptop 4090, it achieves in total 10.1× speedup by eliminating CPU offloading.
items.capZh: 图8：SVDQuant将12B FLUX.1的模型大小减少了3.6倍。此外，我们的引擎Nunchaku进一步将16位模型的内存使用减少了3.5倍，并在桌面和笔记本电脑NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU上比NF4 W4A16基线实现了3.0倍的加速。值得注意的是，在笔记本电脑4090上，通过消除CPU卸载，它总共实现了10.1倍的加速。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Our INT4 model seamlessly integrates with off-the-shelf LoRAs without requiring requantization. When applying LoRAs, it matches the image quality of the original 16-bit FLUX.1-dev. See Appendix C for the text prompts.
items.capZh: 图9：我们的INT4模型与现成的LoRA无缝集成，无需重新量化。应用LoRA时，其图像质量与原始16位FLUX.1-dev相匹配。文本提示见附录C。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Ablation study of SVDQuant on PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma. The rank of the low-rank branch is 64. Image Reward is measured over 1K samples from MJHQ. Our results significantly outperform the others, achieving the highest image quality by a wide margin.
items.capZh: 图10：SVDQuant在PixArt-Σ上的消融研究。低秩分支的秩为64。Image Reward在MJHQ的1K样本上测量。我们的结果显著优于其他方法，以较大优势实现了最高图像质量。

items.en: Memory save & speedup. In Figure 8, we report measured model size, memory savings, and speedup for FLUX.1. Our INT4 quantization reduces the original transformer size from 22.2 GiB to 6.1 GiB, including a 0.3 GiB overhead due to the low-rank branch, resulting in an overall 3.6× reduction. Since both weights and activations are quantized, compared to the NF4 weight-only-quantized variant, our inference engine Nunchaku even saves more memory footprint, and offers 3.0× speedup on both desktop- and laptop-level NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPUs. Notably, while the original BF16 model requires per-layer CPU offloading on the 16GB laptop 4090, our INT4 model fits entirely in GPU memory, resulting in a 10.1× speedup by avoiding offloading. We anticipate even greater speedups for FP4-quantized models on NVIDIA’s next-generation Blackwell GPUs, as they inherently support microscaling for group quantization without the need for specialized GPU kernels.
items.zh: 内存节省与加速。在图8中，我们报告了FLUX.1的模型大小、内存节省和加速测量结果。我们的INT4量化将原始Transformer大小从22.2 GiB减少到6.1 GiB，包括低秩分支带来的0.3 GiB开销，总体减少了3.6倍。由于权重和激活都被量化，与仅权重量化的NF4变体相比，我们的推理引擎Nunchaku节省了更多内存占用，并在桌面和笔记本电脑级NVIDIA RTX 4090 GPU上提供了3.0倍的加速。值得注意的是，原始BF16模型在16GB笔记本电脑4090上需要逐层CPU卸载，而我们的INT4模型完全适合GPU内存，通过避免卸载实现了10.1倍的加速。我们预计FP4量化模型在NVIDIA下一代Blackwell GPU上将实现更大的加速，因为它们原生支持分组量化的微缩放，无需专门的GPU内核。

items.en: Integrate with LoRA. Previous quantization methods require fusing the LoRA branches and re-quantizing the model when integrating LoRAs. In contrast, our Nunchaku eliminates redundant memory access, allowing adding a separate LoRA branch. In practice, we can fuse the LoRA branch into our low-rank branch by slightly increasing the rank, further enhancing efficiency. In Figure 9, we exhibit some visual examples of applying LoRAs of five different styles (Realism, Ghibsky Illustration, Anime, Children Sketch, and Yarn Art) to our INT4 FLUX.1-dev model. Our INT4 model successfully adapts to each style while preserving the image quality of the 16-bit version. For more visual examples, see Appendix B.2.
items.zh: 与LoRA集成。先前的量化方法在集成LoRA时需要融合LoRA分支并重新量化模型。相比之下，我们的Nunchaku消除了冗余内存访问，允许添加单独的LoRA分支。在实践中，我们可以通过略微增加秩将LoRA分支融合到我们的低秩分支中，进一步提高效率。在图9中，我们展示了一些将五种不同风格（写实、吉卜力插画、动漫、儿童素描和毛线艺术）的LoRA应用于我们的INT4 FLUX.1-dev模型的视觉示例。我们的INT4模型成功适应了每种风格，同时保持了16位版本的图像质量。更多视觉示例见附录B.2。

items.en: Ablation study. In Figure 10, we present several ablation studies of SVDQuant on PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma. First, both SVD-only and naïve quantization perform poorly in the 4-bit setting, resulting in a severe degradation of image quality. While applying smoothing to the quantization slightly improves image quality compared to naïve quantization, the overall results remain unsatisfactory. LoRC (Yao et al., 2023) introduces a low-rank branch to compensate for quantization errors, but this approach is suboptimal. Quantization errors exhibit a smooth singular value distribution. Consequently, low-rank compensation fails to effectively mitigate these errors, as discussed in Section 4.2. In contrast, we first decompose the weights and quantize only the residual. As demonstrated in Figure 5, the first several singular values are significantly larger than the rest, allowing us to shift them to the low-rank branch, which effectively reduces weight magnitude. Finally, smoothing consolidate the outliers, further enabling the low-rank branch to absorb outliers from the activations and substantially improving image quality.
items.zh: 消融研究。在图10中，我们展示了SVDQuant在PixArt-Σ上的几项消融研究。首先，仅SVD和朴素量化在4位设置下表现不佳，导致图像质量严重下降。虽然对量化应用平滑比朴素量化略微提高了图像质量，但总体结果仍不理想。LoRC（Yao等人，2023）引入低秩分支来补偿量化误差，但这种方法不是最优的。量化误差表现出平滑的奇异值分布。因此，低秩补偿无法有效缓解这些误差，如第4.2节所述。相比之下，我们首先分解权重，仅量化残差。如图5所示，前几个奇异值明显大于其余部分，因此我们可以将它们转移到低秩分支，这有效降低了权重幅度。最后，平滑整合了异常值，进一步使低秩分支能够吸收激活中的异常值，并显著提高图像质量。

items.en: Trade-off of increasing rank. Figure 11 presents the results of different rank r𝑟r in SVDQuant on PixArt-ΣΣ\Sigma. Increasing the rank from 16 to 64 significantly enhances image quality but increases parameter and latency overhead. In our experiments, we select a rank of 32, which offers a decent quality with minor overhead.
items.zh: 增加秩的权衡。图11展示了SVDQuant在PixArt-Σ上不同秩r的结果。将秩从16增加到64显著提高了图像质量，但增加了参数和延迟开销。在我们的实验中，我们选择了秩32，它在提供良好质量的同时开销较小。

items.capEn: Figure 11: Increasing the rank r𝑟r of the low-rank branch in SVDQuant can enhance image quality, but it also leads to higher parameter and latency overhead.
items.capZh: 图11：增加SVDQuant中低秩分支的秩r可以提高图像质量，但也会导致更高的参数和延迟开销。

items.en: In this work, we introduce a novel 4-bit post-training quantization paradigm, SVDQuant, for diffusion models. It adopts a low-rank branch to absorb the outliers in both the weights and activations, easing the process of quantization. Our inference engine Nunchaku further fuses the low-rank and low-bit branch kernels, reducing memory usage and cutting off redundant data movement overhead. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SVDQuant preserves image quality. Nunchaku further achieves a 3.5× reduction in memory usage over the original 16-bit model and 3.0× speedup over the weight-only quantization on an NVIDIA RTX-4090 laptop. This advancement enables the efficient deployment of large-scale diffusion models on edge devices, unlocking broader potential for interactive AI applications.
items.zh: 在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的4位后训练量化范式SVDQuant，用于扩散模型。它采用低秩分支吸收权重和激活中的异常值，简化了量化过程。我们的推理引擎Nunchaku进一步融合了低秩和低位分支内核，减少了内存使用并消除了冗余数据移动开销。大量实验表明，SVDQuant保持了图像质量。Nunchaku在NVIDIA RTX-4090笔记本电脑上进一步实现了比原始16位模型3.5倍的内存使用减少和比仅权重量化3.0倍的加速。这一进步使得大规模扩散模型能够在边缘设备上高效部署，为交互式AI应用释放了更广泛的潜力。

items.en: Limitations. In this work, we do not report the speedups for our FP4 models. This is because we have no access to Blackwell GPUs, which natively support the precision and microscaling for group quantization. On Blackwell hardware, we anticipate greater speedups compared to our INT4 results on 4090 GPUs.
items.zh: 局限性。在这项工作中，我们没有报告FP4模型的加速情况。这是因为我们无法访问Blackwell GPU，后者原生支持分组量化的精度和微缩放。在Blackwell硬件上，我们预计相比在4090 GPU上的INT4结果会有更大的加速。
